acceptance_conditions.condition: contract, protocol, R155 evidence, and source hashes remain exact
32 distinct post-preregistration operating-system processes each compile the frozen row once
every process emits a complete callback trace, final OpenQASM 3 file, environment, and identity manifest
every callback row records the frozen pass, circuit, timing, shape, and bounded property-set fields
all final hashes are retained and classified as known R155, new, or single-variant evidence
all pass sequences and aligned circuit/property hashes are compared across final-variant classes
if multiple variants occur, representative final QASM artifacts receive a structured gate-level diff
the first observed circuit and property-set divergence rows are emitted when identifiable
all raw process artifacts, comparisons, classifications, and transcript bindings are complete and replayable
no hidden seed, selection, route change, sampling, mechanism, hardware, transfer, advantage, BQP, solved-frontier, or credit claim occurs

claim_boundary.what_is_not_supported: a compiler mechanism claim from pass correlation alone, proof of a Qiskit bug, new hidden statistical evidence, simulation or hardware performance, temporal or real-device transfer, route advantage, quantum advantage, BQP separation, solved B4/B8/B10, or new credit
claim_boundary.what_is_supported: an immutable pass-level diagnostic of the public R155 FakeNairobiV2 trial-21 automatic-compilation transient

execution_protocol.capture_rule: record every callback pass row, normalized circuit hash and shape, bounded property-set summary, final OpenQASM 3, process identity, and runtime

classification_rule.first_circuit_divergence: first aligned callback count whose circuit hash differs across final-variant classes
classification_rule.first_property_divergence: first aligned callback count whose bounded property-set summary differs
classification_rule.known_variants_reproduced: both R155 final OpenQASM 3 hashes occur in the 32 immutable processes
classification_rule.new_variant_observed: any final OpenQASM 3 hash falls outside the two R155 hashes
classification_rule.single_variant_nonreproduction: all 32 final OpenQASM 3 hashes are identical

execution_protocol.diagnostic_completion_rule: completion requires all 32 processes and all comparison artifacts; one, two, or more final variants are retained without exclusion
execution_protocol.process_rule: each compilation executes in a distinct operating-system process after public preregistration
execution_protocol.research_question: At which named Qiskit pass does the seeded FakeNairobiV2 trial-21 automatic compilation first split into the R155 OpenQASM 3 variants?

research_question: At which named Qiskit pass does the seeded FakeNairobiV2 trial-21 automatic compilation first split into the R155 OpenQASM 3 variants?
